display.purpose: Login panel hero heading. Not used inside the authenticated dashboard.

headline.purpose: Page-level titles. One per view, never inside a card.

title.purpose: Section headings, card headers, panel titles.

body.purpose: Permit descriptions, form labels, list content. 65–75ch max width on prose.

label.purpose: Tags, badges, metadata, navigation items, button text.

mono.purpose: Permit IDs, reference codes, timestamps that need column alignment.

shadows.name: ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Cards and panels at rest. Minimum depth signal.

shadows.name: ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards and clickable rows on hover. The lift communicates affordance.

shadows.name: action-accent
shadows.purpose: Primary orange CTA buttons only. Colored shadow grounds the accent against neutral surfaces.

shadows.name: action-accent-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state of primary CTA. Intensified shadow reinforces the lift.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: State changes: hover, focus, color transitions. 150–200ms.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Entrance animations: sidebar slide-in, panel reveal. 300–400ms.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: hover backgrounds, icon color shifts.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions: button press, input focus, badge color change.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The primary action in any view. Authorizes work, submits forms, opens creation flows.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg>Solicitar Nuevo Permiso</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #F96B07; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(249 107 7 / 0.20), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(249 107 7 / 0.10); transition: background 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d45800; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(249 107 7 / 0.30), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(249 107 7 / 0.15); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #d45800; transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F96B07; outline-offset: 3px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: background 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions: 'Ver todos', navigation shortcuts, inline text actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost">Ver todos los permisos<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><polyline points="9 18 15 12 9 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; background: transparent; color: #002D62; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; padding: 8px 12px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f8fafc; color: #F96B07; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #002D62; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Status Badge — Active
components.description: Permit is active and within time bounds. Always paired with icon and text.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; border-width: 1px; border-style: solid; } .ds-badge__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-badge--active { background: #ecfdf5; color: #065f46; border-color: #6ee7b7; } .ds-badge--active .ds-badge__dot { background: #10b981; } .ds-badge--pending { background: #fffbeb; color: #92400e; border-color: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge--pending .ds-badge__dot { background: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge--critical { background: #fef2f2; color: #991b1b; border-color: #fca5a5; } .ds-badge--critical .ds-badge__dot { background: #f87171; } .ds-badge--closed { background: #f1f5f9; color: #475569; border-color: #cbd5e1; } .ds-badge--closed .ds-badge__dot { background: #94a3b8; }

components.name: Status Badge — Pending
components.description: Permit awaiting a required signature or approval.

components.name: Status Badge — Critical
components.description: Permit is expiring, high-risk, or requires immediate attention.

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form inputs throughout — login credentials, permit search, worker lookup.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 14px; color: #94a3b8; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; padding: 12px 16px 12px 44px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #64748b; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #F96B07; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgb(249 107 7 / 0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Item
components.description: Navigation links in the dark navy sidebar. Active state uses Alert Orange as the single location anchor.
components.html: DashboardPermisos de TrabajoTrabajadores
components.css: .ds-sidebar { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item svg { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); flex-shrink: 0; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); color: rgba(255,255,255,1); } .ds-nav-item:hover svg { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #F96B07; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(249 107 7 / 0.25); } .ds-nav-item--active svg { color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Permit List Row
components.description: The signature component — used in both general and critical permit panels. Icon + title/location + status badge + metadata + chevron.
components.html:
Mantenimiento de Cinta Transportadora

Planta de Congelados, Sector B

Activo
4h restantesJuan Pérez M.PG-2026-0412
components.css: .ds-permit-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-permit-row:hover { background: rgba(248,250,252,0.7); } .ds-permit-row:hover .ds-permit-title { color: #002D62; } .ds-permit-row:hover .ds-permit-chevron { color: #002D62; } .ds-permit-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; color: #64748b; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-permit-row:hover .ds-permit-icon { border-color: #bfdbfe; color: #2563eb; } .ds-permit-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-permit-top { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; } .ds-permit-info { min-width: 0; } .ds-permit-title { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; transition: color 0.15s ease; } .ds-permit-location { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #64748b; margin-top: 2px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-permit-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-permit-meta > span { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-permit-time { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-permit-id { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-permit-chevron { color: #cbd5e1; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 4px; transition: color 0.15s ease; }

narrative.overview:
SafeWork is designed like a mission-critical control room: every element visible because something depends on it, no decoration without operational purpose. A Prevencionista scanning 15 active permits at 06:30 on the plant floor needs to orient in under two seconds — the design earns that in structure, not in style. The sidebar is the command spine, institutional navy anchoring authority and continuity. Alert orange fires only when a decision or action is required; its rarity is what makes it a reliable signal.

The palette, typography, and elevation vocabulary are all calibrated for high-stakes readability: outdoor industrial lighting, shared tablets, users who may be wearing gloves. Information density is a feature, not a problem. Components repeat consistently — the same button shape, the same badge vocabulary, the same card anatomy — because the tool should disappear into the task.

What this system explicitly rejects: the cheerful consumer app (gradient accents, playful copy, illustration-heavy empty states); the generic startup dashboard (decorative gradients, hero metrics that perform rather than inform); legacy enterprise tools (cluttered navigation, opaque state labeling).
keyCharacteristics: Institutional navy as structural backbone; alert orange reserved for action and urgency only
Status legibility treated as a safety requirement, not a design choice
Touch-appropriate density: 44px minimum interactive targets throughout
Single typeface family, multiple weights — no decorative fonts
Motion conveys state change only; no orchestrated page sequences

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Alert orange is used on ≤15% of any given screen. Its role is singularly: primary actions, the active navigation item, and critical urgency signals. Orange used decoratively loses its operational meaning.

rules.name: The Status Contract
rules.body: The four status colors (green/amber/red/gray) form a sealed vocabulary. They are never repurposed. Each status color always appears with both an icon and a text label; color alone fails in poor lighting.

rules.name: The Single Voice Rule
rules.body: Inter is the only typeface in this system. Never introduce a serif, display, or script face. The operational context demands unambiguous legibility at any size, on any screen, in any lighting.

rules.name: The Scale Ceiling Rule
rules.body: No text larger than 2.25rem (36px) inside the authenticated surfaces. The Headline role at 1.5rem is the working ceiling in the dashboard.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface rests flat. Shadows appear only in response to state — hover, active, floating dialog. A card decorated with a shadow at rest when it isn't interactive is wrong.

rules.name: The Tonal Layering Rule
rules.body: Three distinct surface values create depth without shadows: Page Canvas (#f1f5f9) → Inner Surface (#f8fafc) → Card White (#ffffff). These are not interchangeable; don't skip levels.

dos: Do use Alert Orange exclusively for primary CTAs, the active navigation item, and safety-urgency signals.
Do pair every status color with an icon AND a text label — never color alone.
Do verify muted text (#64748b) achieves 4.5:1 contrast against its background before using it for anything beyond secondary metadata.
Do maintain 44px minimum touch targets on all interactive elements.
Do use shadow-sm at rest and shadow-md on hover for interactive cards.
Do use @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) alternatives for every animation.
Do keep the three tonal layers distinct: Canvas → Surface → Card.
Do use Inter at 600+ weight for any label that needs to communicate state or instruction.
donts: Don't use orange decoratively — as a section highlight, an icon tint, or a background accent.
Don't use red (#ef4444) outside its semantic role as critical/error/expiring.
Don't default to cards for grouping. Nested cards are always wrong.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on list items or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) anywhere in the system.
Don't add eyebrow labels above nav groups or content sections as default scaffolding.
Don't let Framer Motion stagger animations gate content visibility.
Don't give this interface the tone of a consumer app — no playful micro-copy, no illustration-heavy empty states.
Don't use placeholder text color #94a3b8 on white — fails 4.5:1 AA contrast. Use #64748b minimum.
